testcase.name: Simple Page Check › inspect page structure
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › tests/simple-check.spec.ts:4:7 › Simple Page Check › inspect page structure ───────── Error: locator.isVisible: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Error') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

Error Rate

aka getByText('Error Rate', { exact: true }) 2) Error rate aka getByText('Error rate', { exact: true }) Call log: - checking visibility of locator('text=Error') 34 | 35 | // Check for any error states > 36 | const errorText = await page.locator('text=Error').isVisible(); | ^ 37 | console.log("Error visible:", errorText); 38 | 39 | expect(title).toContain('OpenClaw Mission Control'); at /root/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control-dashboard/e2e/tests/simple-check.spec.ts:36:56 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium/error-context.md Retry #1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error: locator.isVisible: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Error') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

Error Rate

aka getByText('Error Rate', { exact: true }) 2) Error rate aka getByText('Error rate', { exact: true }) Call log: - checking visibility of locator('text=Error') 34 | 35 | // Check for any error states > 36 | const errorText = await page.locator('text=Error').isVisible(); | ^ 37 | console.log("Error visible:", errorText); 38 | 39 | expect(title).toContain('OpenClaw Mission Control'); at /root/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control-dashboard/e2e/tests/simple-check.spec.ts:36:56 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium-retry1/video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium-retry1/error-context.md attachment #4: trace (application/zip) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium-retry1/trace.zip Usage: npx playwright show-trace ../test-results/tests-simple-check-Simple-Page-Check-inspect-page-structure-chromium-retry1/trace.zip ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
